title: Structured Agent Briefing
description: 5-field handoff schema. Replaces full-context forwarding (which scales quadratically). Pass POINTERS, not documents.

objective.description: Single sentence outcome the next agent must achieve

constraints.description: Hard rules the next agent must respect (budgets, deadlines, no-go zones)

prior_decisions.description: What was already decided + why. Prevents re-litigation.

evidence_pointers.description: File paths, URLs, memory:tag references. NEVER full document content.

expected_output.description: Schema or shape of the desired return value

examples.objective: Draft a LinkedIn post about Eric's Q1 traction numbers
constraints: No mention of LUSKI by name

prior_decisions.decision: Use Q1 revenue figure not user count
prior_decisions.rationale: Revenue is more verifiable + impressive given size

prior_decisions.decision: Lead with the surprise, not the number

examples.expected_output: Single post body as plain text, no preamble, no hashtags
